message:
test(widgets): add 22 unit tests for layout_debugger.rs (bd-4f8e1)

Cover LayoutConstraints (new, unconstrained, width/height
overflow/underflow), LayoutRecord (fields, with_child, overflow,
underflow, no violation), LayoutDebugger (enable/disable, clear,
multiple records), export_dot (empty, quote escaping, nested children),
render_debug (disabled noop, overflow red color, underflow yellow
color). 25 total tests (3 existing + 22 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
